# hetzner_boot_rescue (Resource)

Manages the rescue system boot configuration for a Hetzner dedicated server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Activates the rescue system on next boot.
resource "hetzner_boot_rescue" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
  os            = "linux"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `os` (String) Operating system for rescue mode (e.g. `linux`, `vkvm`).
- `server_number` (Number) The server number.

### Optional

- `arch` (Number) Architecture (64 or 32). Defaults to 64.
- `authorized_key` (String) SSH key fingerprint(s) for authentication.
- `keyboard` (String) Keyboard layout. Defaults to `us`.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether rescue mode is currently active.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Generated password for rescue mode. Only available on activation.
- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network.
